zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Grenville於1432年1月21日之前出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Sir William Grenville53歲，母親Philippa Bonville17歲。他於1447年9月7日與Anne Courtenay在英國素瑞阿黑林頓結婚。他去世於1483年3月在英國可瓦爾，埋葬在英國可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Grenville于1432年1月21日之前出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲Sir William Grenville53岁，母亲Philippa Bonville17岁。他于1447年9月7日与Anne Courtenay在英国素瑞阿黑林頓结婚。他去世于1483年3月在英国可瓦爾，埋葬在英国可瓦爾吉爾哈普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Grenville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Grainville-la-Teinturière in Seine-Maritime, France.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Grenville was born before 21 January 1432, in Cornwall, England, his father, Sir William Grenville, was 53 and his mother, Philippa Bonville, was 17. He married Anne Courtenay on 7 September 1447, in Atherington, Surrey, England. He died in March 1483, in Cornwall, England, and was buried in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Grenville est né avant 21 janvier 1432, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Grenville, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Philippa Bonville, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Anne Courtenay le 7 septembre 1447, à Atherington, Surrey, Angleterre. Il est décédé en mars 1483, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Kilkhampton, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Grenville vor 21. Januar 1432 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Grenville 53 und seine Mutter Philippa Bonville 17. Er hat am 7. September 1447 in Atherington, Surrey, England Anne Courtenay geheiratet. Er starb im März 1483 in Cornwall, England und wurde in Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Grenville è nato il prima del 21 gennaio 1432 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Sir William Grenville, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Bonville, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Anne Courtenay il 7 settembre 1447, nel Atherington, Surrey, England. Morì nel marzo 1483, nel Cornwall, England, e fu sepolto a Kilkhampton, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Grenvilleが1432年1月21日以前にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir William Grenvilleは53歳，母Philippa Bonvilleは17歳であった。1447年9月7日にイギリススリーアスエリントンでAnne Courtenayと結婚した。彼は1483年3月にイギリスコルンワルで死去し，イギリスコルンワルキルクハンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Grenville(이)가 1432년 1월 21일 이전 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Grenville(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Bonville(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1447년 9월 7일 영국 수리 앳헤링턴에서 Anne Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1483년 3월 영국 코른월에서 사망했으며 영국 코른월 킬카프턴에 묻혔다.

mn.before 21 January 1432–March 1483: 1432 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 21–наас өмнө–1483 оны Гуравдугаар сар

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Grenville nasceu antes 21 de janeiro de 1432, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Grenville, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Bonville, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Courtenay em 7 de setembro de 1447, em Atherington, Surrey, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em março de 1483, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Grenville родился перед 21 январь 1432 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Grenville было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa Bonville, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Courtenay 7 сентября 1447 г. в местности атирингтон, сурри, Англия. Он умер марта 1483 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия и был похоронен в местности килхамптон, корнвалл, Англия.

es.before 21 January 1432–March 1483: antes de 21 de enero de 1432–marzo de 1483
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Grenville nació antes de 21 de enero de 1432, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Grenville, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Philippa Bonville, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Anne Courtenay el 7 de septiembre de 1447, en Atherington, Surrey, Inglaterra. Murió en marzo de 1483, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Kilkhampton, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
